Z3 inputs: https://zenodo.org/records/16740866/files/QF_LIA.tar.zst?download=1
Z3 commit message: Fix single-threaded build: define mk_parallel_tactic stub

In SINGLE_THREAD builds the stub was misnamed mk_parallel_tactic2, leaving
mk_parallel_tactic undefined and breaking linking of the WASM and ST builds
(undefined reference from fd_solver, smt_tactic_core, inc_sat_solver).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
